en: The LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel, that they take for me a contribution. From every man whose heart moves him you shall receive the contribution for me.
zh: “你要告訴以色列民，叫他們給我送禮物來，所有心裡樂意奉獻的人，你們就可以收下他們給我的禮物。

en: And this is the contribution that you shall receive from them: gold, silver, and bronze,
zh: 以下是你們要從他們收取的禮物：金、銀、銅、

en: blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, goats' hair,
zh: 藍色紫色朱紅色線、細麻、山羊毛、

en: tanned rams' skins, goatskins, acacia wood,
zh: 染紅的公羊皮、海狗皮、皂莢木、

en: oil for the lamps, spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense,
zh: 燈油、膏油的香料和焚香用的香料，

en: onyx stones, and stones for setting, for the ephod and for the breastpiece.
zh: 紅瑪瑙和鑲嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的寶石。

en: And let them make me a sanctuary, that I may dwell in their midst.
zh: 他們要為我建造聖所，使我可以在他們中間居住。

en: Exactly as I show you concerning the pattern of the tabernacle, and of all its furniture, so you shall make it.
zh: 按著我指示你建造會幕和一切器具的樣式，你們要照樣建造。

en: "They shall make an ark of acacia wood. Two cubits and a half shall be its length, a cubit and a half its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.
zh: “他們要用皂莢木做一個櫃，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分，高六十六公分。

en: You shall overlay it with pure gold, inside and outside shall you overlay it, and you shall make on it a molding of gold around it.
zh: 你要用純金包櫃，內外都要包上；櫃上的四圍要做金邊。

en: You shall cast four rings of gold for it and put them on its four feet, two rings on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.
zh: 你要鑄造四個金環，安放在櫃的四腳上，兩個環在這邊，兩個環在那邊。

en: You shall make poles of acacia wood and overlay them with gold.
zh: 你要用皂莢木做幾根櫃槓，並要用金包裹起來。

en: And you shall put the poles into the rings on the sides of the ark to carry the ark by them.
zh: 你要把櫃槓穿在櫃旁的環中，以便用槓抬櫃。

en: The poles shall remain in the rings of the ark; they shall not be taken from it.
zh: 櫃槓要常留在櫃的環中，不可抽出環外。

en: And you shall put into the ark the testimony that I shall give you.
zh: 你要把我賜給你的法版放在櫃裡。

en: "You shall make a mercy seat of pure gold. Two cubits and a half shall be its length, and a cubit and a half its breadth.
zh: 你要用純金做施恩座，長一百一十公分，寬六十六公分。

en: And you shall make two cherubim of gold; of hammered work shall you make them, on the two ends of the mercy seat.
zh: 你要用黃金錘成兩個基路伯，放在施恩座的兩端。

en: Make one cherub on the one end, and one cherub on the other end. Of one piece with the mercy seat shall you make the cherubim on its two ends.
zh: 這端做個基路伯，那端做個基路伯，二基路伯要與施恩座連在一起製造，在施恩座的兩端。

en: The cherubim shall spread out their wings above, overshadowing the mercy seat with their wings, their faces one to another; toward the mercy seat shall the faces of the cherubim be.
zh: 二基路伯要在上面展開雙翼，遮掩施恩座，基路伯的臉要彼此相對，他們的臉要朝著施恩座。

en: And you shall put the mercy seat on the top of the ark, and in the ark you shall put the testimony that I shall give you.
zh: 你要把施恩座安放在櫃頂，又要把我賜給你的法版放在櫃裡。

en: There I will meet with you, and from above the mercy seat, from between the two cherubim that are on the ark of the testimony, I will speak with you about all that I will give you in commandment for the people of Israel.
zh: 我要在那裡和你相會，也要從施恩座上面，從二基路伯之間，告訴你一切我命令你傳給以色列人的事。

en: "You shall make a table of acacia wood. Two cubits shall be its length, a cubit its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.
zh: “你要用皂莢木做一張桌子，長八十八公分，寬四十四公分，高六十六公分。

en: You shall overlay it with pure gold and make a molding of gold around it.
zh: 你要用純金包桌子，桌子的四圍要做金邊。

en: And you shall make a rim around it a handbreadth wide, and a molding of gold around the rim.
zh: 你要給桌子的四圍做七十五公釐寬的框邊，框邊上的四圍要做金邊。

en: And you shall make for it four rings of gold, and fasten the rings to the four corners at its four legs.
zh: 你要做四個金環，把金環安放在桌子的四角上，就是在桌子的四腳上。

en: Close to the frame the rings shall lie, as holders for the poles to carry the table.
zh: 環子要靠近框邊，用來穿桌槓，以便抬桌子。

en: You shall make the poles of acacia wood, and overlay them with gold, and the table shall be carried with these.
zh: 你要用皂莢木做幾根桌槓，又要用金包裹起來，桌子要用桌槓來抬。

en: And you shall make its plates and dishes for incense, and its flagons and bowls with which to pour drink offerings; you shall make them of pure gold.
zh: 你要做桌子上的盤子、碟子、酒杯和奠酒用的瓶，這些你要用純金製造。

en: And you shall set the bread of the Presence on the table before me regularly.
zh: 你又要在桌子上，在我面前，常常擺放陳設餅。

en: "You shall make a lampstand of pure gold. The lampstand shall be made of hammered work: its base, its stem, its cups, its calyxes, and its flowers shall be of one piece with it.
zh: “你要用純金做一個燈臺，那燈臺你要用鎚錘成；燈臺的座、幹、杯、球、花，都要與燈臺連在一起。

en: And there shall be six branches going out of its sides, three branches of the lampstand out of one side of it and three branches of the lampstand out of the other side of it;
zh: 燈臺的兩邊伸出六個枝子；一邊有三個燈臺枝子，另一邊也有三個燈臺枝子。

en: three cups made like almond blossoms, each with calyx and flower, on one branch, and three cups made like almond blossoms, each with calyx and flower, on the other branch- so for the six branches going out of the lampstand.
zh: 在第一個枝子上有三個杯，形狀像杏花，有球、有花；在另外一個枝子也有三個杯，形狀像杏花，有球、有花。從燈臺伸出的六個枝子，都是這樣。

en: And on the lampstand itself there shall be four cups made like almond blossoms, with their calyxes and flowers,
zh: 燈臺上有四個杯，形狀像杏花，有球、有花。

en: and a calyx of one piece with it under each pair of the six branches going out from the lampstand.
zh: 每兩個枝子的下面有球和燈臺相連，從燈臺伸出來的六個枝子，都是這樣。

en: Their calyxes and their branches shall be of one piece with it, the whole of it a single piece of hammered work of pure gold.
zh: 球和枝子都要與燈臺連在一起，都是從一塊純金錘成的。

en: You shall make seven lamps for it. And the lamps shall be set up so as to give light on the space in front of it.
zh: 你要做燈臺上的七個燈盞，這些燈盞要放在燈臺之上，使燈光照亮對面的地方。

en: Its tongs and their trays shall be of pure gold.
zh: 燈臺上的燈剪和燈花盆，也是要純金做的。

en: It shall be made, with all these utensils, out of a talent of pure gold.
zh: 要用三十五公斤純金做燈臺和一切器具。

en: And see that you make them after the pattern for them, which is being shown you on the mountain.
zh: 你要留心照著在山上指示你的樣式去做。”
